analysis_commentary: warmup=1000 re-run ALSO anomalously slow: 92 training steps (normal ~340), first probe at t=208s. max stayed stable [0.13, 0.21], illegal 0.998-0.999 (never dropped), aboveU=0 throughout. Stalled-but-not-collapsed regime — similar to warmup=1500. Two consecutive warmup=1000 trials both exhibited the slow-start anomaly; warmup=1500 ran normally. Unclear cause (buffer-fill variance, not logged to run.log). Goal metrics far worse than current best.
